arts.ttl: Espanyol vs Girona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Espanyol, currently sitting in 15th place, host 14th-placed Girona in a La Liga clash on Monday, March 10th, with kick-off scheduled for 20:00. Both teams will be eager to secure valuable points to cl...

arts.ttl: Union Berlin loanee Král expected to sign permanently for Espanyol
arts.sum: A fee in the low single digit millions would be enough for Union Berlin to sell.
